_publications._publicationTitle: Optical coherence tomography of the macular ganglion cell layer in children with neurofibromatosis type 1 is a useful tool in the assessment for optic pathway gliomas.

_contextSnippet: The GC-IPL was significantly correlated to pRNFL (correlation coefficient (r) = 0.662, confidence interval (CI) = .507 to .773 p<0.001), VA (r = -0.661, CI = -7.45 to -.551, p<0.001) and VFI (r = 0.644, CI = .452 to .774, p<0.001)
resourceName: Cirrus HD-OCT device (Cirrus; Carl Zeiss Meditec, Dublin, CA, USA)
details: GC-IPL showed strong correlations with other visual function measures: pRNFL (r=0.662, p<0.001), VA (r=-0.661, p<0.001), and VFI (r=0.644, p<0.001)
